member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.AgentDiscovery.AgentDiscoveryWorker
member.summary:
Phase 1 gather worker: discovers the agent's web presence, downloads their headshot and brokerage logo, scrapes third-party profiles (Zillow, Realtor.com), extracts GA4 measurement IDs, and checks WhatsApp registration status.
Pure compute — calls IOAuthRefresher, IHttpClientFactory, and IWhatsAppSender only. No storage, no DataServices.

Phase 1 gather worker: discovers the agent's web presence, downloads their headshot and brokerage logo, scrapes third-party profiles (Zillow, Realtor.com), extracts GA4 measurement IDs, and checks WhatsApp registration status.
Pure compute — calls IOAuthRefresher, IHttpClientFactory, and IWhatsAppSender only. No storage, no DataServices.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.AgentDiscovery.AgentDiscoveryWorker.IsAllowedUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Validates a URL before fetching to prevent SSRF attacks. Only HTTPS URLs to public internet hosts are allowed.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.AgentDiscovery.AgentDiscoveryWorker.BuildWebsiteSearchUrls(System.String,System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.EmailSignature)
member.summary: Builds search URLs: agent site from email sig, plus Google search for Zillow/Realtor.com profiles.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.AgentDiscovery.AgentDiscoveryWorker.ParseThirdPartyProfiles(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.DiscoveredWebsite})
member.summary: Parses structured data from Zillow, Realtor.com, and similar third-party profiles. Uses regex heuristics on the HTML — no scraping library dependency.
